common.appTagline: Make prompts feel more like writing
common.appFooterTagline: Let prompt writing feel as natural as flowing ink.

login.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
login.terms: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

error.emailPasswordRequired: Please enter your email and password.
error.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

success.signup: Sign-up successful. Please check your inbox to verify your account.

auth.callbackIncomplete: The login callback did not finish. Please try again.

promptList.emptyDefaultDescription: Create your first prompt to get started
promptList.deleteMessage: Delete prompt "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

dialog.addToFolderEmpty: No custom folders yet. Create one first.

promptEditor.saveWithVersion: Saved and created a new version
promptEditor.switchVersionBlocked: You cannot switch versions while streaming is in progress.
promptEditor.restoreVersionBlocked: You cannot restore a version while streaming is in progress.
promptEditor.restoreVersionConfirm: Restore version {{version}}? This will create a new version.
promptEditor.optimized: Optimization complete. A new version was created.
promptEditor.maxModels: You can add up to {{count}} models.
promptEditor.duplicateModel: This model has already been added.
promptEditor.removeModelBlocked: You cannot remove a model while a test is running.
promptEditor.createDescription: Enter a name, content, and tags to create a new prompt.
promptEditor.tagsPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter
promptEditor.squareSourceDescription: This private prompt was copied from the square entry "{{title}}". You can keep editing, favorite it, and save your own versions here.
promptEditor.squareSourceTesting: You are testing the private copy created from the square entry "{{title}}". Test results only affect your own library.

publishDialog.title: Confirm square publish
publishDialog.description: Review the public-facing metadata before publishing. The title, summary, category, and difficulty shape how others discover and understand this prompt.

placeholders.title: For example: Brand content strategy assistant
placeholders.summary: Explain what problem this prompt solves and when someone should use it.

publishDialog.allowFullPreviewHint: When disabled, the square detail page only shows a summary and preview snippet instead of the full prompt.

promptEditor.editSaveNote: Saved from editing based on v{{version}}

tagInput.defaultPlaceholder: Type a tag and press Enter

optimizePanel.title: Optimize prompt
optimizePanel.ideaPlaceholder: For example: strengthen the role framing, add output format guidance, and cover edge cases.

testPanel.title: Test prompt
testPanel.inputPlaceholder: Enter the user message or extra context you want to test in this round...
testPanel.noPresetModels: There are no more preset models available to add.
testPanel.customNamePlaceholder: Display name, for example: My GPT-4.1
testPanel.customModelRequired: Please provide the model name, Base URL, and API key.

placeholder.error: The test failed. Please try again later.

featureTour.title: Welcome to InkPrompt
featureTour.subtitle: Here is a quick tour of the main features
featureTour.footer: Tip: you can reopen this tour later from settings.

create.title: Create and manage prompts
create.description: Use the “New prompt” button to create your first prompt template, then organize it with tags.

history.title: Track version history
history.description: Each prompt edit automatically creates a new version, so you can review history or roll back anytime.

search.title: Search and filter faster
search.description: Search prompt content with keywords, filter by tags, and sort results in multiple ways. Search history is saved automatically.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Use Ctrl+K or Cmd+K to jump straight to the search box and move faster.

square.title: Discover prompts the community is actually using
square.subtitle: Start from real examples, then copy them into your workspace to test, refine, and iterate.
square.searchPlaceholder: Search titles, summaries, or prompt content...
square.heroPanelBody: This is not just a gallery. You can copy any public prompt into your library and continue refining it with the optimization and testing tools you already use.
square.popularTagsHint: Start with common use cases to find prompts you can reuse right away.
square.author: Author
square.howToUseBody: Copy it into your own workspace first, validate it with the testing panel, then adapt and version it for your real scenario.
square.detailNoteBody: Some authors do not publish the full text. We prioritize summaries and partial previews so prompts remain discoverable while creators keep control over what is public.

confirm.copyTitle: Copy this prompt into my library?
confirm.copyMessage: This will create or reuse a private copy in your library. Any edits you make later will not affect the original square entry.
confirm.testTitle: Copy this prompt and open testing?
confirm.testMessage: We will first save this square prompt as your private copy, then jump straight into the testing panel.

messages.loadFailed: Failed to load the prompt square
messages.alreadySaved: This prompt is already in your library. Opened the existing copy instead.
messages.testReady: Copied and opened in the testing workflow
messages.testOpenedExisting: Opened the existing copy in your library and entered testing.
messages.quickCopyFailed: Failed to copy the visible content
messages.copyFailed: Failed to copy into your library
messages.partialPreview: The author did not expose the full prompt. This preview is meant to help you judge the structure and use case.
messages.loginHint: Sign in to like, favorite, and copy this prompt into your personal workspace.

steps.copy: Copy it into your personal prompt library
steps.test: Run a real input through the testing panel
steps.iterate: Refine the result and save new versions

empty.title: No public prompts match the current filters yet
empty.description: Try clearing filters, or start again from the popular tags.

meta.title: Ink & Prompt - Manage, refine, and test prompts like a real writing workflow
meta.description: Ink & Prompt gives prompt creators one workspace for organization, versioning, optimization, and multi-model testing.

hero.kicker: A focused workspace for serious prompt creators
hero.title: Manage, refine, and test prompts like part of your writing flow.
hero.subtitle: From first draft to versioned experiments and multi-model comparisons, Ink & Prompt turns scattered prompt attempts into reusable creative assets.

preview.label: Live Workspace
preview.title: A prompt workbench that feels closer to editing than babysitting tabs
preview.promptMeta: Updated today · connected to version history
preview.promptBody: You are a senior content strategy consultant. Combine brand tone, channel nuance, and user intent into an execution-ready outline, then add tone guidance for each section.
optimizeItems: Add an output format to reduce rework
Save refinements directly as a new version

features.title: Stop leaving your best prompts buried in chat history
features.subtitle: Every part of the product is built around making prompts easier to keep, iterate, and prove before you ship them into real work.

items.title: Prompt management
items.description: Organize prompts the way you organize drafts, with folders, tags, search history, and quick retrieval.
items: Tag and folder organization
Search, filter, and sort in one place
Keep frequently used prompts within reach

items.title: Version control
items.description: Every refinement is tracked. Review diffs, annotate changes, and roll back without fear.
items: Automatic version history
Clearer version diff views
Safer experimentation and rollback

items.title: Smart optimization
items.description: Get AI suggestions on structure, tone, clarity, and edge-case handling so you can tighten prompts faster.
items: Multi-angle refinement guidance
Bring your own optimization goal
Save refined results as a fresh version

items.title: Multi-model testing
items.description: Run the same prompt across multiple models at once and compare style, quality, and expected cost.
items: Concurrent streaming model output
See quality differences side by side
Keep test history for later review

steps.title: Three steps from rough prompt to repeatable workflow
steps.subtitle: You do not need a complex system first. Start writing, refine the weak spots, then compare outputs before committing.

items.title: Create your first prompt
items.description: Sign in and save the prompts you already rely on. Everything else builds from this first versioned draft.
items: Quick Google sign-in supported
Add tags and folders from the start
Ideal for building a personal prompt library

items.title: Refine with the optimization assistant
items.description: Describe your goal or pain point and get practical suggestions around structure, tone, formatting, and constraints.
items: Surface ambiguity faster
Keep the original while generating a new version
Useful for content, product, and engineering workflows

items.title: Test multiple models in parallel
items.description: Let multiple models answer the same prompt so you can judge quality, voice, and stability before shipping.
items: Save time with concurrent output
Review differences on the same screen
Keep test sessions as reusable evidence

testimonials.title: Used as a daily workspace by creators, PMs, and developers
testimonials.subtitle: The product turns prompts from disposable experiments into durable assets that can be iterated, reviewed, and trusted.

items.quote: My prompts used to live across docs, chats, and notes. Now I can finally organize, compare, and roll them back in one place.
items.name: Lin Qi

items.quote: The multi-model testing flow is excellent. One run is enough to tell which model fits the job best.
items.name: Zhou Bo

items.quote: The optimization assistant does more than rewrite. It catches missing goals, formatting gaps, and unclear boundaries.
items.name: Yvonne

items.quote: Version control is the part I rely on most. I can experiment aggressively without losing the version that already worked.
items.name: Chen Yu

footer.brandKicker: Let prompt writing feel as natural as flowing ink.
footer.description: Ink & Prompt turns scattered prompt experiments into a sustainable workflow for creators, developers, and anyone who cares about shaping AI output well.
